Name: BOSS_PARTS_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters for boss model parts.

Fields.Name: HP Category
Fields.Description: The HP category for this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Animation ID
Fields.Description: The damage animation ID to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Hit Material
Fields.Description: The hit material to use when this boss part is hit.

Fields.Name: Defence
Fields.Description: The defence power of this boss part.
